raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current work stressors","name":"What part of your workload feels like it's causing you to be late most often?","description":"Explores the underlying causes of consistent lateness, potentially revealing workload or time management issues.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Team dynamics","name":"How are you feeling about the team dynamics right now?","description":"Surfaces any interpersonal issues that might be affecting team performance or personal stress.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needs","name":"What do you need from me right now to help with your current workload?","description":"Opens up for Carl to express any specific support needs from the manager that could aid in managing workload or punctuality.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Energy management","name":"What strategies are you using to maintain your energy levels throughout the week?","description":"Probes for personal strategies in place to manage energy and avoid burnout.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Role clarity","name":"How clear are you on your role and its current priorities?","description":"Assesses Carl's understanding of his role and whether it aligns with team and company goals.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Growth opportunities","name":"Where do you see opportunities for growth in your current projects?","description":"Encourages Carl to identify areas for personal and professional growth within his current role.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Project prioritisation","name":"What would you drop if you had to cut something from your workload this week?","description":"Surfaces what Carl sees as low priority, which can help with workload management and focus.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Future focus","name":"What are you most excited to tackle next after your current projects?","description":"Identifies what Carl is looking forward to, shedding light on engagement and motivation.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Managerial effectiveness","name":"What's one thing I could do differently to support your work better?","description":"Invites feedback on management style and support effectiveness.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Session closure","name":"What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?","description":"Encourages Carl to commit to a tangible action or goal before the next meeting.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
